description: Camorra clan based in Naples, Italy, formed in the early 1980s by the Sarno brothers (Ciro, Vincenzo, Luciano, Giuseppe, Pasquale). It emerged after the dissolution of the Nuova Famiglia and engaged in conflicts with the Alleanza di Secondigliano and the De Luca Bossa clan. The clan later allied with the Mazzarella and Misso families to form a dominant cartel in Naples.
